title: Xaero Map Spigot
description: Adds server side support for Xaero's World Map and Minimap to your spigot server!
body: Adds server side support for Xaero's map mods on spigot. Currently, the only server-side functionality that Xaero's World Map supports is selecting the correct map when joining the world which this plugin adds support for on Spigot/Bukkit based servers.
